form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when won by 1.3 len at Te Rapa 3yo Mdn-Sw August 23 over 1200m in heavy going defeating Shoma with 57.5kg at $2.20. Has impressed at the trials beating G2 winner My Wish  - who was placed on Sunday in Group Company most recently. Big chance in his HK debut.
